name: HyprMX
description: Mobile ad network bringing direct-sold brand video and rewarded ads to app publishers, subsidiary of Jun Group.

seo.title: HyprMX — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: HyprMX: Mobile ad network bringing direct-sold brand video and rewarded ads to app publishers, subsidiary of Jun Group.

when_to_use: Brand-safe rewarded video from direct-sold brand advertisers for publishers
Premium video ad demand for mobile apps beyond standard programmatic fill
Rewarded ad monetization targeting brand advertiser budgets via Jun Group
Incremental eCPM lift with brand video fills in rewarded ad placements

pros: Direct-sold brand demand drives premium eCPMs
Strong in rewarded video for games
cons: Not a primary network, always secondary fill
review.verdict: Premium brand video that pays well when it fills, but not a standalone monetization strategy.
review.best_for: Game publishers adding premium brand video to a mediation waterfall.
review.not_for: Apps wanting programmatic scale or primary network volume.
